overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting the view from a vessel's bridge as it navigates through foggy, overcast waters. Three navigation monitors display radar, chart, and sonar data while the ship maintains steady forward progress through the gray seascape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, maintaining steady course through foggy waters while monitoring navigation displays

entered.detail: teal-colored chart display showing vessel position and navigation data
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
blue depth finder display showing underwater terrain and depth readings
gray metal deck of the vessel bow with anchor equipment and railings
silver horizontal railings lining the edge of the bridge deck
dark gray choppy water surface extending to the horizon
faint gray line where overcast sky meets the sea

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and sonar data as the vessel moves steadily through foggy, overcast waters. The radar sweep rotates continuously while the ship's bow cuts through the gray ocean, with no other vessels or land visible in the hazy conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dense, monochromatic seascape. It begins with a focus on three navigation monitors displaying active chart, radar, and sonar data while the vessel pushes forward. As the camera looks past the consoles, the view opens to the ship's bow cutting through the gray ocean under an overcast sky. The scene remains immersed in hazy conditions, with the rotating radar sweep providing the only rhythmic movement against a horizon where no land or other vessels are visible.
